Notes.Text:
This update for iputils fixes the following issues:

- CVE-2025-47268: Fixed integer overflow in RTT calculation can lead to undefined behavior (bsc#1242300)

Notes.Title: Patchnames

Relationships.RelatesToProductReference: SUSE Linux Enterprise Module for Basesystem 15 SP7

Vulnerabilities.Description: ping in iputils before 20250602 allows a denial of service (application error or incorrect data collection) via a crafted ICMP Echo Reply packet, because of a signed 64-bit integer overflow in timestamp multiplication.

ProductID: SUSE Linux Enterprise Module for Basesystem 15 SP7:iputils-20221126-150500.3.11.1
